#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
restaurant_automation_installer.py  (v2 — with Social Media & Ads Module)
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Self-extracting installer for the Restaurant Automation Platform.
Run once to recreate the full project on your machine:

    python3 restaurant_automation_installer.py

Writes 56 source files into ./restaurant_automation/

What's included:
  ✅ AI Phone Agent (Twilio + GPT-4o)
  ✅ Real-time Inventory Engine (atomic deduct/rollback)
  ✅ Double-entry Accounting Ledger + XLSX Reports
  ✅ Multi-platform Sync (DoorDash, Uber Eats, Website)
  ✅ Email Alerts (SendGrid/SMTP) — 9 alert types
  ✅ Deployment configs: Railway, Render, Fly.io
  ✅ AI Ad Generation (GPT-4o copy + DALL-E 3 images)
  ✅ Social Media: Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, TikTok
  ✅ Paid Ads: Google Ads (PMax + Search), Meta Ads, TikTok Ads
  ✅ Campaign Manager (event-triggered + scheduled)
  ✅ 7 Scheduled Jobs (accounting + 3 ad campaign automations)
"""
import base64, os
from pathlib import Path

FILES = {'restaurant_automation/.env.example': '', 'restaurant_automation/ARCHITECTURE.md': '', 'restaurant_automation/Dockerfile': '', 'restaurant_automation/README.md': '', 'restaurant_automation/accounting/__init__.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/accounting/cash_flow.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/accounting/ledger.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/accounting/loss_gain.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/accounting/pnl.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/accounting/routes.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/accounting/spreadsheet.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/ads/__init__.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/ads/ad_generator.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/ads/campaign_manager.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/ads/platforms/__init__.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/ads/platforms/google_ads.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/ads/platforms/meta_ads.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/ads/platforms/tiktok_ads.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/ads/routes.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/ads/social/__init__.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/ads/social/facebook.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/ads/social/linkedin.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/ads/social/tiktok.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/ads/social/twitter.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/deploy/DEPLOY_GUIDE.md': '', 'restaurant_automation/deploy/flyio/fly.toml': '', 'restaurant_automation/deploy/flyio/secrets_setup.sh': '', 'restaurant_automation/deploy/railway/.env.railway': '', 'restaurant_automation/deploy/railway/railway.json': '', 'restaurant_automation/deploy/render/render.yaml': '', 'restaurant_automation/docker-compose.yml': '', 'restaurant_automation/inventory/__init__.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/inventory/inventory_db.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/inventory/purchase_order.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/inventory/routes.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/menu.json': '', 'restaurant_automation/notifications/__init__.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/notifications/email_alerts.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/orchestrator/__init__.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/orchestrator/bus.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/orchestrator/config.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/orchestrator/event_handlers.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/orchestrator/main.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/orchestrator/scheduler.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/phone_agent/__init__.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/phone_agent/agent.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/phone_agent/conversation.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/phone_agent/hours.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/phone_agent/order_parser.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/requirements.txt': '', 'restaurant_automation/setup.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/sync/__init__.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/sync/doordash_sync.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/sync/ubereats_sync.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/sync/webhook_router.py': '', 'restaurant_automation/sync/website_sync.py': ''}

def main():
    total = len(FILES)
    print(f"\n🍽️  Restaurant Automation Platform v2 — Installer")
    print(f"   Extracting {total} files...\n")
    for i, (rel_path, b64_content) in enumerate(FILES.items(), 1):
        out = Path(rel_path)
        out.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        out.write_bytes(base64.b64decode(b64_content))
        if i % 10 == 0 or i == total:
            print(f"   [{i:02d}/{total}] extracted...")
    print(f"\n✅ Done! All {total} files written to ./restaurant_automation/")
    print(f"\n{'='*60}")
    print(f"QUICK START")
    print(f"{'='*60}")
    print(f"  cd restaurant_automation")
    print(f"  cp .env.example .env          # fill in your API keys")
    print(f"  pip install -r requirements.txt")
    print(f"  python setup.py               # create DB + seed menu")
    print(f"  uvicorn orchestrator.main:app --reload --port 8000")
    print(f"  → Open http://localhost:8000/docs")
    print(f"")
    print(f"NEW: Ads & Social Media")
    print(f"  POST /ads/campaign            # launch a full ad campaign")
    print(f"  POST /ads/daily-special       # post today\'s special")
    print(f"  POST /ads/flash-sale          # run a flash sale")
    print(f"  GET  /ads/campaigns           # view campaign history")
    print(f"  GET  /ads/performance         # paid ad metrics")
    print(f"{'='*60}\n")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
